Package com.marswars.subsystem

Class MwSubsystem<StateType extends Enum<StateType>,ConstantsType extends MwConstants>

java.lang.Object

All Implemented Interfaces:
MwSubsystemBase
public abstract class MwSubsystem<StateType extends Enum<StateType>,ConstantsType extends MwConstants> extends Object implements MwSubsystemBase

    • update

      public void update(double timestamp)
      DO NOT OVERRIDE THIS METHOD IN THE BASE CLASS IF YOU DO, BAD THINGS WILL HAPPEN! YOUR SUBSYSTEM WILL NOT TICK CORRECTLY
      Specified by:
      update in interface MwSubsystemBase

    • getSubsystemKey

      public String getSubsystemKey()
      a common logging key to use for the subsystem
      Specified by:
      getSubsystemKey in interface MwSubsystemBase
      Returns:
      the logging key to use as a base. eg getSubsystemKey() + "Some Special Value"

    • getNtKey

      public String getNtKey()
      a common NT key to use for the subsystem
      Returns:
      the NT key to use as a base. eg getSubsystemKey() + "Some Special Value"

      public String getName()
      Gets the name of the subsystem used to enable and disable. Also used for logging

      getName in interface MwSubsystemBase

      the string name of the subsystem
